---
title: "Principal investigator"
---

::: {.person}
![](images/people/Portrait_Small.jpg){fig-alt="Profile photo" width="240"}

### Dr. Hui Wang

Assistant Professor

Nanjing-Helsinki Institute in Atmospheric and Earth System Sciences, Nanjing University


CV: 
<a class="btn btn-outline-secondary" href="file/CV_Hui_Wang_May_2026.pdf" target="_blank" aria-label="CV">
  <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i>
</a>


## Job History:

2026- Assistant Professor in Nanjing University

2024-2026 Postdoc Researcher in University of California Irvine

## Eduacation history:

2019-2024 University of California Irvine, PhD in Earth System Science (Advisor: Alex B. Guenther)

2015-2018 Beijing Normal University, Master in Global Environment Change (Advisor: Qizhong Wu)

2011-2015 Hefei University of Science and Technology, Bachelor in Geographic Information System

Research interests: biogenic volatile organic compounds, urban air quality, earth system modeling.
:::
